name: The Wild Universe RPG
description:
Hunt, Cook, Eat! Inspired by Toriko, Dungeon Meshi, and Cuisineer, this is a realm where food is the ultimate treasure.

🌍 The 4 Great Continents and various small islands:
• Chiocco: European-inspired gastronomy.
• Easiver: East Asian culinary techniques.
• Haemmi: Halal and Middle Eastern flavors.
• Wacamola: Latin American & BBQ West.

🐉 Dungeons & The Taste Record (TTR):
The world is filled with Dungeons containing bizarre, delicious, or deadly monsters. Every discovered ingredient and recipe is recorded in The Taste Record (TTR), the ultimate encyclopedia for adventurers.

🧬 The Ecosystem:

Encounter procedurally generated creatures categorized into Beast, Plant, Parasite, Hybrid and Amorphous. Danger and culinary value are ranked from 1 ★ (Common) to the legendary 8 ★ (World-Altering). Hunt them, cook them, or trade them!

Choose your Profession:

  1. 🍖 Gourmet Hunter: Masters of combat, hunting rare dungeon monsters.

  2. 🍳 Chef: Geniuses who turn dangerous beasts into mouth-watering dishes.

  3. 🌿 Conservation Researcher: Scholars who study ecosystems and breed rare flora/fauna.

  4. 📝 Food Journalist: Adventurers who document new recipes for the perfect scoop.

  5. 💰 Merchant: Buy good, sell better! They don't go to the dungeons themselves...or do they?

(Note: You will interact with key NPCs like Nia the Guild Receptionist, or face the strict evaluations of the elite Judges).

Gotta Eat Them All! ✪ ω ✪

Which models to use? I tested this bot with Gemini-3-flash, Qwen-80B and Qwen-232B, also Deepseek-R1-Llama. I recommend any model that has Thinking mode or Instruct. Personally I think it works best with Gemini and Qwen. Deepseek is...lazy in cooking.

Bot is fluent in English but also works with your native language.

"You don't have my country/desired cuisine!": My bad! (っ °Д °;)っ Besides 4 Great Continents, there are sooooo many small islands or continents. You can tell the bot, give it a short description! "I came from Narnia, the Noodle Land that is next to Easiver and famous for Nori Fish!" Bot will handle it!

"I want to be a higher level Prof!": Just tell Nia "I already had my dungeon card, I am level 3/4/5." Nia will give you a mission to activate your permit, just follow!
creator: SeraSela
